name: Beignets (Creole Doughnuts)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over shortening, sugar, and salt. Add milk; let stand until warm.
2. Dissolve yeast in warm water; add to milk mixture along with beaten egg.
3. Stir in 2 cups flour. Beat.
4. Add enough flour to make a soft dough. Place in a greased bowl. Grease the top of the dough, cover with waxed paper and a cloth. Chill until ready to use.
5. Roll dough to 1/4 inch thickness. Do not let dough rise before frying.
6. Cut into squares and fry a few at a time in deep hot fat (360 degrees). Brown on one side, turn and brown on the other.
7. Drain on paper towels. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
